column1: # する-compound verbs (名詞+する) — a noun (or loanword) plus する, inheriting
# する's irregular conjugation. Dictionary forms only. The bare noun may also
# appear in the nouns/ decks; the true irregulars する/来る live in irregular.tsv.

to be nervous; to feel tense
to expect; to look forward to
